description: The UsersAssetLoadProgress component is commonly used with ProtoFlux to tell if a particular User has loaded an asset. The node in particular is the Asset Load Progress ProtoFlux node. This component takes any IAsset as the generic argument for the component.

fields.Asset: The Asset to monitor loading progress for.
fields.ProgressInfo: A list of users in the session and their status on loading the specified ``Asset``.
fields.TotalUsers: The total users in the session that see ``Asset`` exists?
fields.UsersNotLoaded: How many users haven't fully loaded ``Asset``?
fields.UsersLoading: How many users are trying to load ``Asset`` currently?
fields.UsersPartiallyLoaded: How many users are currently in the process of downloading ``Asset``?
fields.UsersFullyLoaded: How many users have finished loading ``Asset``?
fields.UsersFailedToLoad: How many users failed to load ``Asset`` due to an error?

usage: Attach to a slot and provide an asset to ``Asset`` for this component to start working.
